positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed illustration of celestial flora and fauna—combining stylized moon flowers, glowing nebula vines, and cosmic geometric elements. The style is a fusion of Art Nouveau and neo-traditional woodcut print, rendered with ultra-sharp lines and deep, velvety blacks. Central, circular composition, designed as a strong, singular silhouette for apparel printing. Limited, harmonious color palette featuring deep sapphire blue, shimmering gold leaf accents, and emerald green. Highly graphic, vector-like quality, uniform line weight, suitable for a chest graphic print, mystical, ethereal.
